summary.what: Make timbers log --anchor document a single commit at 0 pending; point the refusal at --range
summary.why: The --anchor flag's name promises 'use this anchor', but at 0 detected pending it still refused — honoring it (single-commit range) closes the off-first-parent/0-pending gap osprey hit, and --range is now named in the refusal as the explicit escape hatch
summary.how: getLogCommits falls back to LogRange(anchor^, anchor) when pending is empty and --anchor is set; extracted commit-resolution helpers to log_resolve.go for the file-length limit; ref-aware mock + TestLogAnchorBypassesZeroPending lock it in
